[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01100000 2
1 01101001 4
2 11110000 4
3 01010111 5
4 11101111 7
5 11111011 7
6 11110111 7
7 11111111 a
